name: Braised Pheasant
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Thinly sliced green apple peels
Herbal salt substitute and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. In a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat, quickly brown pheasants in oil on all sides. Place apples and onions around the pheasant. Pour Applejack or calvados on top and let it heat for 1 minute, then turn off the heat.
2. Dust the top of the pheasant with nutmeg. Place the pan back in the oven and bake until juice runs clear when a knife is inserted into the thigh of the bird (about 1 hour). Remove the cooked pheasant, apples, and onions to a platter and keep warm in the oven.
3. Transfer the pan juices to a saucepan. Heat over medium-high heat until simmering, then stir in half-and-half. Let the mixture cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently, then season to taste with salt substitute and pepper. Pour over pheasant and serve.
